title: alchemilla argyrophylla subsp. argyrophylloides
intro: Alchemilla argyrophylla subsp. argyrophylloides, also known as the Silver-leaved Lady's Mantle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla argyrophylla subsp. argyrophylloides include soothing and calming effects on the skin, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, often to treat wounds, skin irritations, and other minor health issues.
